items.title: OSM 선적재와 보행 네트워크 생성
items.verification: 2026-04-23 source strategy changed from busan.osm.pbf to N3L_A0020000_26 SHP; local simulation confirms 248,425 line features in EPSG:5179 and 12,140 lines in the Jangsan 5km bbox, but schema and loader redesign are still pending

items.title: CSV 및 BIMS 기반 보강 ETL
items.verification: 2026-04-22 canonical schema DB reload completed: places=13,564, place_accessibility_features=42,368, segment_features=120,357, subway_station_elevators=203, low_floor_bus_routes=146 with hasLowFloor=true for 118 rows; remaining work is ETL hardening for 15m~30m matching and audio NO propagation
